wind field · storm cells · lightning · tropical — hooks feed overlays directly
basemap style JSON (MMKV-cached, fetch traced) · Protomaps vectors · zoom buttons
constant child count — a mounted RasterSource can never change its tile URL

temp · wind · CAPE · precip · cloud tiles
Skia canvas worklet — 1200 particles advected on the UI thread, zero React re-render
